# Multi-Document Pack Notes

Use this pack as separate upload files:

1. `doc-01-overview.md`
Contains: course title, description, overview.

2. `doc-02-lesson-fundamentals.md`
Contains: Lesson 1 content.

3. `doc-03-lesson-governance.md`
Contains: Lesson 2 content.

4. `doc-04-lesson-metrics.md`
Contains: Lesson 3 content + key takeaways.

Goal: validate cross-document extraction and deterministic topic assignment coverage.
